reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Given the 5-day rest and your recent ride averaging 71% of FTP, we need to start controlled and focus on intervals that challenge your aerobic base and improve your ability to clear lactate. This session simulates the demands of the Alpine Loop’s main climb by employing over-unders at key power targets.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6 x 6-minute over-under intervals: 3 minutes at 201-218W (mid-zone sweet spot) followed by 3 minutes at 242-256W (above FTP). Short 1-minute recoveries at 50% FTP between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
